subcodes.first_line: O thou wronged one! Praise be to God that thou hast borne every tribulation and affliction in the path of Truth and hast drunk from the cup of trials and sufferings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مظلومه الحمد لله در سبیل حق هر بلائی و جفاای تحمل نمودی و از جام محن و آلام
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @service to others; to the Cause of God
